attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.PDB_PRE_PROGRAM_HIERARCHY_DIM)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_PDB_PRE_PROGRAM_HIER_DIM.PROGRAM_HIERARCHY_KEY, STG_PDB_PRE_PROGRAM_HIER_DIM.PROGRAM_ID, STG_PDB_PRE_PROGRAM_HIER_DIM.PROGRAM_NAME, STG_PDB_PRE_PROGRAM_HIER_DIM.PROGRAM_DESC, STG_PDB_PRE_PROGRAM_HIER_DIM.PROGRAM_START_DATE, STG_PDB_PRE_PROGRAM_HIER_DIM.PROGRAM_END_DATE, STG_PDB_PRE_PROGRAM_HIER_DIM.PROGRAM_PHASE_ID, STG_PDB_PRE_PROGRAM_HIER_DIM.PROGRAM_PHASE_NAME, STG_PDB_PRE_PROGRAM_HIER_DIM.PROGRAM_PHASE_DESC, STG_PDB_PRE_PROGRAM_HIER_DIM.PROGRAM_PHASE_START_DATE, STG_PDB_PRE_PROGRAM_HIER_DIM.PROGRAM_PHASE_END_DATE, STG_PDB_PRE_PROGRAM_HIER_DIM.PROGRAM_ACTIVE_FLAG, STG_PDB_PRE_PROGRAM_HIER_DIM.PHASE_ACTIVE_FLAG, STG_PDB_PRE_PROGRAM_HIER_DIM.CREATED_BY, STG_PDB_PRE_PROGRAM_HIER_DIM.CREATED_DATE, STG_PDB_PRE_PROGRAM_HIER_DIM.UPDATED_BY, STG_PDB_PRE_PROGRAM_HIER_DIM.UPDATED_DATE, STG_PDB_PRE_PROGRAM_HIER_DIM.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_PDB_PRE_PROGRAM_HIER_DIM.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_PDB_PRE_PROGRAM_HIER_DIM.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_PDB_PRE_PROGRAM_HIER_DIM.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_PDB_PRE_PROGRAM_HIER_DIM.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_PDB_PRE_PROGRAM_HIER_DIM STG_PDB_PRE_PROGRAM_HIER_DIM,
 (
 select PROGRAM_HIERARCHY_KEY ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_PDB_PRE_PROGRAM_HIER_DIM
 minus
 select PROGRAM_HIERARCHY_KEY ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.PDB_PRE_PROGRAM_HIER_DIM
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.PROGRAM_HIERARCHY_KEY = STG_PDB_PRE_PROGRAM_HIER_DIM.PROGRAM_HIERARCHY_KEY and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_PDB_PRE_PROGRAM_HIER_DIM.REFRESH_DATETIME
